#Hiring - Full Stack Developer (MERN / Node.js)

Location: Candidates must be based in Tamil Nadu
Employment Type: Full-Time | On-Site
Experience: 1 - 3 Years

How to Apply
Share your updated resume via email to: careers@ysquaretechnology.com

Email Subject Line (Mandatory): Application for Full Stack Developer (MERN / Node.js)

Details to Include in the Email Body:
▪️ Current Location
▪️ Total Years of Experience
▪️ Notice Period Duration & Availability
▪️ Current CTC & Expected CTC

Note: Only email applications sent to the above email ID will be considered. Calls or in-person approaches are not encouraged.

About the Role
We are seeking a passionate & detail-oriented Full Stack Developer to join our enterprise product team. The ideal candidate will have strong fundamentals in Node.js, React.js, & TypeScript, along with experience building scalable applications using microservices architecture.
You will be working on enterprise-grade solutions with modern cloud infrastructure & AI-assisted development tools.

Key Responsibilities
▪️Design, develop, & maintain scalable full-stack enterprise applications
▪️Build RESTful APIs using Node.js & Express.js
▪️Develop responsive & dynamic frontend applications using React.js & TypeScript
▪️Implement clean architecture & microservices-based backend systems
▪️Design & optimize databases using MySQL and MongoDB
▪️Work with ORMs such as Prisma & TypeORM
▪️Collaborate with cross-functional teams (QA, DevOps, Product, UI/UX)
▪️Write clean, maintainable, & well-documented code
▪️Participate in code reviews & follow enterprise coding standards
▪️Utilize AI-powered developer tools to improve productivity

Technical Skills Required
▪️Core Technologies
▪️Node.js

▪️React.js
▪️TypeScript
▪️Databases

▪️Basic knowledge of system design principles

▪️Amazon CloudFront

AI Development Tools (any one)

Ajay Kumar.postText:
We’re Hiring: Backend Developer – Node.js (Serverless & Microservices)
We are looking for an experienced Backend Engineer to design and build scalable backend systems using Node.js and serverless technologies for enterprise workforce management platforms.

# Key Responsibilities
- Design and develop scalable backend services using Node.js (Nest.js / Express)
-  Build serverless solutions using AWS Lambda / GCP Cloud Functions
-  Implement SSO integrations (OAuth2 / OIDC / SAML) and token-based authentication
-  Develop microservices and event-driven architectures
-  Work with API gateways, caching layers, queues, and distributed systems
- Integrate with enterprise systems built in Java, .NET, PHP, and Python
- Follow DevOps best practices including Docker, CI/CD, Infrastructure as Code (Terraform/CDK)
- Ensure secure deployments, monitoring, logging, and auto-scaling

# Required Skills
- Strong experience with Node.js (Nest.js / Express)
- Hands-on experience with serverless architecture
- Experience with OAuth2, OIDC, SAML authentication
- Knowledge of microservices & distributed systems
- Experience with Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud platforms

# Location - Gurgaon

# Experience - 4+ years

To apply: Please send your updated CV to vishal.singh@tagbin.in with the subject line “Backend Engineer – Node.js Application.”

Modh Yusuf, Jagrati Singh, Saqib Khan

Sonam.postText:
Hiring: Full Stack Developer (MERN Stack) – Remote

Experience: 4–6 Years
Positions: 2
Shift: 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM (IST)
Engagement: Full-time Contract
Location: Remote
Candidates must be from India only.

We are looking for Full Stack MERN Developers to build scalable web platforms supporting AI-powered learning workflows, digital course creation platforms, and content production systems.

Key Skills

• MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js
• Advanced React (Redux, React Query, Context API)
• Backend APIs & Microservices architecture
• DevOps: Git, GitHub Actions, Docker, basic Kubernetes
• REST APIs (GraphQL optional)
• Integration with AI APIs (OpenAI / Hugging Face / AWS)
• Testing: Jest, Cypress, Supertest

Responsibilities

• Build scalable full-stack applications using MERN
• Develop backend APIs supporting AI workflows
• Create high-performance React frontends
• Integrate third-party AI services and analytics tools
• Implement CI/CD pipelines and containerized deployments

Please reach out to me at +919899634637 or jbhatia@forcecraver.com to discuss further.

Follow @Jitender Bhatia @Forcecraver Technologies for more job updates.

 JTek Software Solutions is an agile provider of application development, outsourcing, testing, systems integration, and solution delivery services.
 💡 We specialize in Web, Mobile, Enterprise & IoT applications, serving industries like Finance, Healthcare, Telecom, eCommerce, and more.

 We are looking for a Full Stack Developer – MERN Stack with 3 + years of experience who excels at building scalable, high-performance web applications using MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, and Node.js. If you have strong expertise in end-to-end development and best practices, this role is for you!

🚀 WE ARE HIRING: Software Engineers (Java Developers)
Are you a logic-driven developer who thrives on building robust, scalable architectures? Servosys Solutions is looking for a talented java Developers to join our growing engineering team in Mumbai!

As a CMMI Level 3 organization, we don’t just write code; we build sophisticated designs and high-quality products in a modern enterprise web stack.

🛠️ Technical Expertise
Back-End: Core Java, JSP, Servlets, Spring, and Hibernate.
Front-End: HTML/CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, and frameworks like Angular, React, or Node.js.
Web Services: Deep hands-on experience with SOAP & REST.
Databases: Proficiency in MySQL / Oracle and web servers like Apache.
Architecture: Experience developing highly-responsive web-based UIs and distributed environments.

📋 Key Responsibilities
Development: Build new, highly-responsive web-based user interfaces.
Quality First: Write clean, robust code backed by automated unit tests with full coverage.
Collaboration: Work with product teams and UI/UX designers to understand user interactions.
Process Excellence: Participate in design and code-review processes, adhering to standardized CMMI workflows.

🎯 Eligibility & Requirements
Experience: 2 to 3+ Years of professional experience.
Education: B.Tech (CSE/IT) with min. 70% marks throughout academics.
Skills: Strong attention to detail, organizational skills, and a commitment to collaborative problem-solving.

💡 Why Join Servosys?
Product-Based Environment: Work on proprietary enterprise platforms.
Standardized Growth: Experience "defined and standardized" workflows in a mature technical environment.
Security-First Culture: Join a team where Information Security is everyone’s responsibility.

📩 How to Apply?
Ready to take the next step in your career destiny?
📧 Email your CV to: arpit.goel@servosys.com 
📍 Location: Mumbai (On-site)

The role involves both frontend (React.js or Angular) and backend (Node.js or Python) development, with a focus on data visualization and database management (MongoDB). Deployment will be handled via AWS.
Sonam.postText:
We are hiring a motivational junior full Stack Software Developer to design, develop, and maintain scalable web applications, also will be responsible for both front-end and back-end development, ensuring high performance, responsiveness, and seamless system integration.
 
Key Responsibilities:
- Frontend Development: Develop and optimize responsive, user-friendly interfaces using React.js or Angular (ReNile's current web stack). Ensure the dashboard is intuitive for both technical and non-technical users in Arabic and English.
- Backend & API Development: Build and maintain scalable server-side logic and RESTful APIs using Node.js (Express) or Python (Django/FastAPI).
- Data Visualization: Implement real-time charts and historical data graphs that help farmers track parameters like pH, Dissolved Oxygen, and Soil Moisture.
- Database Management: Manage and optimize NoSQL (e.g., MongoDB) or SQL databases to ensure fast retrieval of millions of sensor data points.
- Maintenance & Deployment: Support the deployment of updates via AWS (EC2/S3) and ensure the platform remains stable 24/7 for our clients.
 
Qualifications:
- Education: Fresh grades with Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology, or a relevant technical discipline.
- Core Tech Skills: Basic knowledge of front-end technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript) and Familiarity with at least one back-end language (Node.js, Python, PHP, Java, or .NET).
- Soft Skills: A strong analytical mindset, a highly collaborative attitude, and a proactive approach to continuous learning and problem-solving.
- Communication: Fluency in both Arabic and English (written and spoken) to effectively document technical solutions and communicate seamlessly with the engineering team.

What We Offer:
- Social & medical insurance
- Attractive salary and great opportunity to grow and build you career
- A collaborative, fast-paced startup culture where your code directly shapes the final product.
- Direct, hands-on mentorship from experienced senior engineers.
Flexible working arrangements and opportunities for rapid career advancement within our growing technical team.

How to Apply:
- Send your CV on: hr@renile.net
- Email subject: Junior full Stack Software Developer

We’re Hiring: Backend Developer – Node.js (Serverless & Microservices)
We are looking for an experienced Backend Engineer to design and build scalable backend systems using Node.js and serverless technologies for enterprise workforce management platforms.

- Design and develop scalable backend services using Node.js (Nest.js / Express)
-  Build serverless solutions using AWS Lambda / GCP Cloud Functions

-  Work with API gateways, caching layers, queues, and distributed systems
- Integrate with enterprise systems built in Java, .NET, PHP, and Python
- Follow DevOps best practices including Docker, CI/CD, Infrastructure as Code (Terraform/CDK)
- Ensure secure deployments, monitoring, logging, and auto-scaling

# Required Skills
- Strong experience with Node.js (Nest.js / Express)
- Hands-on experience with serverless architecture
- Experience with OAuth2, OIDC, SAML authentication
- Knowledge of microservices & distributed systems
- Experience with Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud platforms
